description: This file is the main entry point for a React-based frontend application. It imports React libraries, CSS styles, and the main App component, then renders the App component into the DOM.

methods.name: ReactDOM.createRoot
methods.description: Creates a React root to mount the React component tree on the DOM element with specified ID.

methods.name: root.render
methods.description: Renders the React component hierarchy into the created root, starting with <React.StrictMode> and <App />.
